Name: Average time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed after the execution of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants that include reviewer assignment delays
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Elapsed time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and Manuscript Export Succeeded when Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded occurs in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in high-complexity variants (those with more than three reviewer-related activities)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs within 7 days versus cases where it takes longer than 14 days
Metric: the sum of the function base < 7 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that result in acceptance
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in resubmission trajectories
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Cycle Time of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed measured from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to its completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average time for Plagiarism Originality Report Completed grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"

Name: Total resolution time of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'", 'aggregation': 'total'}"
